etymology.description: 目(目) (mù, "eye") + 㚔 (handcuff) = emphasizes visual action like 'picking with eyes'; evolved from early depictions of handcuffs and hands
etymology.interpretation: The character 睪 originally involved an eye 目(目) (mù, "eye") combined with the symbol for a handcuff, 㚔, to emphasize the act of visually picking or selecting, reflective of its early uses in inscriptions related to choosing and releasing.
